title: PromotionRecord
description: A typed wrapper carrying an AI-generated candidate, its provenance, the diff against current state, and the verdicts that promote or reject it.

record_type.description: Open enum naming the candidate kind. v0 known values: memory-update, test-case, skill, brief, contract-clause, post.

candidate_ref.description: Pointer at the candidate payload. Relative path for in-repo candidates, URI for external candidates.

provenance_ref.description: URI-shaped reference to the agent run that produced the candidate. The CLI refuses to submit a record with an empty provenance ref.

diff.description: Unified text diff or RFC 6902 JSON-patch text. Computed by the submitter, not the reviewer.

target.description: URI describing where an approved record ships. v0 supports file:// and repo:// only.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the record entered the queue.

edit_diff.description: Required when decision is edit. The diff between the original candidate and the reviewer's edited candidate.
